name: Terra Santa Agro S.A.
summary: Terra Santa Agro S.A. produces agricultural commodities, such as soybeans, corn, and cotton in Brazil. It manages approximately 133.4 thousand hectares. The company was formerly known as Vanguarda Agro S.A. and changed its name to Terra Santa Agro S.A. in October 2016. Terra Santa Agro S.A. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
